steps.title: Identify the explanation
steps.content: The first clause states that identical DNA can lead to different cell functions. The following clause explains how: the genome contains the DNA sequence, while the epigenome determines which traits are expressed.

steps.title: Use punctuation for explanation
steps.content: A creates a run-on sentence. B creates a comma splice. C places the comma incorrectly after "and" and does not clearly introduce the explanation. A colon after a complete clause correctly signals that the second clause explains the first. The answer is D.
